articles.title: Artificial Intelligence Sneaks Into the World Cup Thanks to Google Gemini
articles.raw_content: The Argentine national team will be Google’s test bench and technological showcase during the World Cup.
articles.summary: Google utilizará al equipo nacional argentino como banco de pruebas y escaparate tecnológico durante el Mundial.

articles.title: Meta signs first AI data center deal in India with Reliance
articles.raw_content: The 168-megawatt facility will support Meta's global AI computing needs and can be expanded over time.
articles.summary: Meta construirá una instalación de 168 megavatios para satisfacer sus necesidades globales de computación de inteligencia artificial.

articles.title: AT&T frames satellite as filling the rural 1%, not eating telco margins
articles.raw_content: AT&T’s Pascal Desroches frames direct-to-device satellite as a complement to terrestrial networks In sum – what we know: AT&T’s CFO laid out the company’s satellite playbook days before Starlink’s parent heads to the public market, and the message was about…
articles.summary: AT&T considera el satélite como complemento a las redes terrestres, según su director financiero Pascal Desroches.

articles.title: Alex Vindman Survived Trump’s Retaliation Machine. Now He’s Running for Senate
articles.raw_content: In 2019, Alex Vindman testified during President Trump’s first impeachment trial–a decision that ended his military career. Now he wants to challenge the president from the halls of Congress.
articles.summary: Alex Vindman, que testificó en el juicio de impeachment de Trump, busca ahora un escaño en el Congreso.

articles.title: AI has an infrastructure problem – and power isn’t the only concern (Reader Forum)
articles.raw_content: AI’s growth is increasingly constrained not by chips but by infrastructure, from data storage and energy demand to connectivity bottlenecks. As data centers expand, the weakest link shifts, threatening to limit AI’s future scale and performance. Frontier AI companies are…
articles.summary: La creciente demanda de infraestructura limita el crecimiento de la inteligencia artificial, desde almacenamiento de datos hasta conectividad.

articles.title: Tests suggest Russian satellites can jam GPS on a continental scale
articles.raw_content:
Russian satellites have been identified as the cause of mysterious, seconds-long bursts of GPS interference across Europe—a rare example of human-made GPS interference coming from space. But uncertainty still hangs over whether such interference is intentional and if it could be more powerfully weaponized as GPS jamming with continental reach in the future.

The discovery came from an investigation detailed in a June 2 preprint paper by Todd Humphreys and his student Zach Clements at The University of Texas at Austin, along with Argyris Krizise at Stanford University in California. By sifting through public data from ground-based stations with global navigation satellite system (GNSS) receivers, they identified a pattern of high-powered interference lasting less than 10 seconds each time but simultaneously detectable by ground stations across Europe from Norway to Spain to Poland, and even reaching as far west as Greenland and Canada.

By analyzing the ground station data from January 2019 to April 2026, the researchers found 75 days with at least one widespread GNSS interference event overlapping with the GPS L1 frequency band centered on 1575.42 megahertz. That represents the main band used for signal transmission by the US-made GPS satellite constellation and GNSS constellations from other countries.

Read full article

Comments
articles.summary: Satélites rusos causan interferencias GPS en Europa, afectando a países como España.

articles.title: Momfluencers Are Pitching AI as a Better ‘Coparent’ Than Men
articles.raw_content: Moms are outsourcing tedious household tasks to ChatGPT and selling courses teaching others to do the same. Where are all the dads?
articles.summary: Madres están externalizando tareas domésticas a ChatGPT y vendiendo cursos para enseñar a otros a hacer lo mismo.

articles.title: Is this the dawn of the Tokenpocalypse?
articles.raw_content: We're likely to see more price increases as the big AI companies plan to go public.
articles.summary: Las grandes empresas de inteligencia artificial planean salir a bolsa, lo que probablemente provocará nuevos aumentos de precios.
